criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and design quality of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, design awards

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, comparative analyses

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Effectiveness of the app's privacy and security measures.
criteria.sources: App permissions, privacy policies, security audits

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and functionality of accessibility features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, accessibility audits
